title: vibeconstruct
description: Build auto any building, Powered by Gemini AI
body:
Construct is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that generates build-ready schematic data from in-game text prompts using Gemini AI.
The mod adds a server command to request structures, tracks job progress, and keeps a short per-player history of recent requests. Players can set their API key from a client UI 

  Main features:
  - /construct <building>: starts an asynchronous generation request
  - /history [limit]: shows recent generation jobs for the player
  - /constructapikey: opens a client screen to save, clear, and sync API key
